title: Our Winner Predictions For The 2026 Golden Globe Awards
text: According to Next Best Picture's predictions for the 2026 Golden Globe Awards, the Best Director category features six nominees with Paul Thomas Anderson for 'One Battle After Another' representing the overwhelming favorite with unanimous support from all 12 predictors on the Next Best Picture panel. Other nominees include Ryan Coogler for 'Sinners', Guillermo del Toro for 'Frankenstein', Jafar Panahi for 'It Was Just an Accident', Joachim Trier for 'Sentimental Value', and Chloé Zhao for 'Hamnet'. The predictions show strong convergence around Anderson's selection, suggesting confidence in this outcome ahead of the January 11th, 2026 ceremony, which was hosted by comedian Nikki Glaser and broadcast on CBS and Paramount+.
